epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: Keen to hear what’s going on…
I’m sure she can! If you sign what you need I’ll get her to sign the rest
Understood… we can’t hide our true selves forever!

redesign with a more human feel that's gonna affect the video and the deck as well

lead.headline: A more human redesign is reshaping your video and deck strategy.
lead.deck: This creative shift affects multiple deliverables and appears connected to your prep work with Caroline and the Day2 Tech debrief happening this afternoon. Clarifying the scope and timeline with your team before 12:30 will keep momentum on track.
